CustomField.description: Immediately sends an SMS notification with details of the Event to the participant. No message will be sent if the participant's Mobile Phone is not set or is invalid, or if the Event is in the past.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Immediately sends an SMS notification with details of the Event to the participant. No message will be sent if the participant's Mobile Phone is not set or is invalid, or if the Event is in the past.
CustomField.label: Send SMS Notification Now
